name: academic-research-skills
description: Suite of Claude Code skills for rigorous academic research, experimentation, paper writing, peer review, and pipeline orchestration. 8 skills covering the full research lifecycle from literature review to publication. v3.15 integrates upstream PaperOrchestra (Semantic Scholar API verification, anti-leakage protocol, VLM figure verification, score trajectory tracking) and Lu 2026 Nature (7-mode AI research failure checklist, reviewer calibration mode, disclosure mode, fidelity-originality mode spectrum). Optional integrations: Semantic Scholar + OpenAlex (citation graph APIs), PaperBanana MCP (methodology diagrams), Google Colab MCP (GPU compute).
